match_details.generated_comment: 调用者未同步更新：CosmeticExtension.cpp 仍通过 DU（DrawUtil 别名）调用 isCosmeticVertex / isCosmeticEdge / isCenterLine，但这些函数已从 DrawUtil 中删除并移至 DrawViewPart。这将导致编译/链接失败。

头文件声明与实现签名不匹配，导致编译错误。头文件声明为 static 成员函数并接受 (App::DocumentObject* owner, std::string element) 两个参数，但实现只接受 (std::string element) 一个参数。此外，实现体内调用了 getProjVertexByIndex() 和 getEdge() 等非静态成员函数，与 static 声明矛盾——static 成员函数没有 this 指针，无法调用非静态成员。 (also flagged by ai_smell/style)
match_details.matched_reference_note: The newly added member functions `isCosmeticVertex`, `isCosmeticEdge`, and `isCenterLine` are incorrectly declared as `static` with an unnecessary `owner` parameter; remove `static` and the `App::DocumentObject* owner` argument to correctly implement them as non-static member functions operating on the current instance.
